final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing travel guide brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou trip, featuring a real Hangzhou map as the main visual thread.

Style/medium: photorealistic editorial brochure design, trifold leaflet mockup floating above textured kraft paper, realistic map cartography with illustrated landmark icons
Composition: top-down flat lay of a trifold brochure, slightly angled 3/4 view showing all three panels, shallow depth of field with kraft paper base visible at edges
Subject: trifold travel guide brochure with authentic Hangzhou map as background, famous scenic spots marked with distinctive landmark icons (断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 灵隐寺, 龙井村, etc.), each day's itinerary highlighted in separate panels
Scene/backdrop: textured kraft paper surface beneath the floating brochure, soft shadow beneath the leaflet suggesting elevation, clean minimal background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, gentle shadows, professional product photography aesthetic
Color palette: muted kraft brown as base, Hangzhou map in soft greens and blues, landmark icons in warm terracotta and gold accents, clean white text panels
Materials/textures: matte paper texture on brochure, slight sheen on printed map areas, visible fiber texture on kraft paper base, crisp printed typography
Text (verbatim): "第一天：西湖经典游" "断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺" "第二天：禅意杭州" "灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城" "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" "九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径" "第四天：运河文艺线/西溪湿地"
Constraints: must show all three folded panels clearly; map must be geographically accurate to Hangzhou; landmark icons must be recognizable; text must be legible at brochure scale
Avoid: generic stock travel imagery; blurry map details; plastic-looking paper; watermark; 8K stuffer text; oversaturated colors
